text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Ngh! It hurts just to wash my face.

text_block_list.name: Young Bespectacled Umamusame
text_block_list.text:
E-excuse me, Brian! If you'd like, you can use
some of my moisturizer.

text_block_list.name: Young Pigtailed Umamusame
text_block_list.text:
Hold on a sec! You trying to steal the show?!
Brian, use mine!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey, I never even said I was going to use—

text_block_list.name: Both Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Look! You're clearly bothering her!
Come on! Mine's definitely better!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Tch! How did I get into this mess?

Narita Brian's skin condition is bringing her all
sorts of trouble.
